name: Quality Tier 7 — conditional aggregation / side-by-side comparison
description: Side-by-side multi-bucket counts in one row via SUM(CASE WHEN ...). Expected = the value of one specific aggregate alias (verified manually below).

Scenarios.Question: compare open vs closed ticket counts
Scenarios.ExpectedShape: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Status='Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Open, SUM(CASE WHEN Status IN ('Closed','Resolved') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Closed — one row, two columns. First-cell scalar = Open count (33).
Scenarios.Notes: Tests the conditional-aggregation worked-example. Grader checks the first cell (the open count, 33).

Scenarios.Question: show bill counts for paid and overdue side by side
Scenarios.ExpectedShape: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Status='Paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Paid, SUM(CASE WHEN Status='Overdue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Overdue — one row, two columns. First cell = Paid count (10862).
Scenarios.Notes: Same shape as QT7-OPEN-VS-CLOSED but on Bills + different status values. Grader checks first cell = Paid count.
